content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Merge K Sorted Arrays". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: 1 <= N <= 10^5, where N is the total number of elements across all arrays
All elements in the input arrays are integers in the range [-10^9, 10^9]
content.inputFormat: The input will contain an integer K, representing the number of sorted arrays, followed by K lines, each containing a sorted array of integers.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a single sorted array containing all the elements from the input arrays.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a min-heap to keep track of the smallest unprocessed element from each array
